name: HermitStash
compose:
name: slashnode-hermitstash
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/dotcoocoo/hermitstash:1.13.0
    container_name: hermitstash
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    environment:
      UMASK: '022'
      TZ: Etc/UTC
      NODE_ENV: production
      TRUST_PROXY: 'true'
      RP_ORIGIN: http://${node.exports.host}:3081
      EMAIL_VERIFICATION: 'false'
    volumes:
      - web_data-db:/app/data
      - web_data-uploads:/app/uploads
      - web_data-custom:/app/public/img/custom
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3081:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-db:
    name: slashnode-hermitstash_web_data-db
  web_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-hermitstash_web_data-uploads
  web_data-custom:
    name: slashnode-hermitstash_web_data-custom
